arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) identifying the SES configuration set.

delivery_options.description: Settings for how emails are delivered, including sending pool and TLS policy.

id.description: The unique identifier for the SES configuration set.

reputation_options.description: Options related to the reputation of the configuration set, including metrics and last reset date.

sending_options.description: Settings that determine if email sending is enabled for the configuration set.

suppression_options.description: Reasons for suppressing emails, such as complaints or bounces.

tags.description: Key-value pairs used to tag and organize the configuration set.

tracking_options.description: Settings for tracking email opens and clicks, including a custom redirect domain.

vdm_options.description: Options for Virtual Deliverability Manager, including dashboard and guardian settings.
